stemHtml: Which statement concerning the cold front and warm front of a frontal depression in the northern hemisphere is correct?

options.a: The wind backs more at the warm front than at the cold front.
options.b: The precipitation zone of the cold front is in general wider than the precipitation zone of the warm front.
options.c: The risk of fog is greater ahead of and behind the warm front than ahead of and behind the cold front.
options.d: While occluding the warm front always becomes a front aloft.
